changes.result: ADVISORY — must be addressed in compiler implementation
changes.citation: Prompt lines 302-309 requires: sort keys/lists deterministically, emit source hashes, emit output hashes. ADVISORY: Python yaml.dump() does not sort keys by default. Cursor must use sort_keys=True or equivalent and pin list sort order explicitly. Without this, same-content input can produce different output hashes across Python sessions or library versions, breaking the determinism requirement.

changes.result: ADVISORY — classify in parity report, do not resolve this sprint
changes.citation: pkg_s24_creatinine_high_renal: (1) Override rules differ — legacy has or_renal_ckd_stage_3 (eGFR<60) and or_renal_acute_imbalance (K+>5.2) per signal_library.yaml lines 44-61; Pass_3 spec has or_creatinine_high_with_uacr_high (UACR high). (2) Supporting markers differ — legacy: egfr, urea, potassium (signal_library.yaml lines 15-16); Pass_3: egfr, uacr, cystatin_c (Batch_4_Pass_3.json). pkg_s24_ferritin_low_iron_deficiency: Legacy has or_ferritin_severe_depletion (ferritin<15 µg/L hardcoded threshold, signal_library.yaml line 70); Pass_3 threshold_notes states no specific threshold asserted. These divergences must appear in the parity/divergence report. Do not resolve clinically in this sprint.
